Lore Item
Slot: NECK
AC: 6
WIS: +3 INT: +3 AGI: +3
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Explorer's Locket
Lore Item
Slot: NECK
AC: 6
WIS: +3 INT: +3 AGI: +3
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Small Compass Locket
Item Type:Compass
Stackable:No
Tribute:94
Lucy Entry By:Atarak
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 07:08:00
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Lake of Ill Omen
NPC Name
a lead explorer

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Lake of Ill Omen
Dropped by a lead explorer. Acts like a compass.


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Drops one out of 5
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2005 at 10:17 AM Rating: Decent
Kajolus
Sage
1,252 posts
took us 7 kills to get two lockets. tribute value is 96.
____________________________
Still a noob. :-P
Characters on Drinal, Povar, EMarr, Firiona Vie.
▲ Page top
Compass direction
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2004 at 1:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259285867
View User Forum
1 post
BTW, the direction displayed on the compass is the direction you are facing. What this means is, the compass will read differently as you change directions (Face east compass reads east, face west compass reads west etc..) just in case no one has noticed this yet.
▲ Page top
Quest ????
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2003 at 7:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783656467
107 posts
The description states that this item is used in a quest, anyone have a clue as to what quest? I have turned in a number of the survival knives, but Trooper Vaurk won't take the locket. Any suggestions???

Elasia Aetolus
47 Shadow Knight
"Innoruuk's Sin" <E'ci>
▲ Page top
Um Mine points to the North

▲ Page top
#Imperfect, Posted: May 26 2002 at 11:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I got this item about 6 months ago gave it to a friend and he posted it with a good screenshot. The credit for this belongs to Ryzlar <Fatal Fury> Quellious
RE: Kind of Lame Allakhazam's
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2002 at 6:42 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591772471238
10 posts
I don't think this item existed 6 months before May 27th.
As stated a few posts down, the explorers were added early March 2002, on the 5th or 6th if I remember correctly. Anywho, a friend told me that he had seen these new mobs about a day later, and I went over and started killing them. Hehe, in fact, the first mob I killed was the lead explorer cause he agroed me before any of the others could. As luck would have it, he dropped the locket the first time I killed him. I had it in my inventory for a few days until I realized that nobody had heard of this decent neck item. Then I decided to take a screenshot of it and post it to Allakhazam. My email was send March 14, 2002 ... I didn't find it in an update till like March 24 or something. Hehe, but that's how it all went down from my understanding = P

Janglur
Leezard SK of the 51st season
The Seventh Hammer
▲ Page top
Random Drop off Lead Explorer
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2002 at 1:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361725130
View User Forum
8 posts
Drops off the Lead Explorer in the Tower at pos1600 and pos 45. Been Soloing this tower with my monk from 24 to 27, easy with FD pulls. its really good exp and you get a locket once in a great while. The Lead Explorer is a Paladin who will buff a yualp spell when he spawns and will do LoH when you get him to 25%. Fairly easy kill. Hope this helps some for some one who could use this.
▲ Page top
Explorers
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2002 at 7:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247695696
24 posts
I have seen these npc's on LoIO. My wife just started playing and I have a chanter in that level so I would group with her. I saw these and knew they had just been added. I killed one to see if maybe they would drop something cool. Guess I have to kill a bit more. The one I killed had a heavy fraction hit, I noticed 4 or so hits, Fv was the major.
▲ Page top
Explorers - new to lake area
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2002 at 6:20 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1595780188692
View User Forum
17 posts
The Explorers in Lake of Ill Omen have only been there since approx early March 2002.

They can be found in the ruined tower type structure on the Nth side of the lake at loc 1900,100 (roughly)

There are 5 or 6 explorers as well as a Lead Explorer I have seen spawn in there. Seem to be on Fironia Vie faction. Killed a few of them including the Lead explorer.. most were Blue to my Iksar Monk at 19 tho i think the lead explorer may have been white/yellow. They drop an explorer survival knife (stackable but no stats.. quest item perhaps?) and the occasional piece of ringmail. Respawn rate seemed quite fast.
▲ Page top
Survival Knives
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2002 at 1:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767733975
116 posts
Yes they are a Quest there is a Warrior Iksar under a 4 Pillar Ruin on the right side of the Iksar Statued Hill going OUT of Cablis who Wants 4 Survival Knives Dont Know the result yet as my Shammy is only lvl 12 and not Willing to Aggro the Explorers yet.

Corripio
Diety PvP
▲ Page top
RE: Survival Knives
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2002 at 7:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779800266
View User Forum
Scholar
48 posts
The result of turning in 4 survival knives at a time is to gain faction with ALL the cabalis groups. This is pretty significant for those of you working on building faction to go into Cabalis. If you've spent any real time in the Lake and/or Overthere killing sarnaks then you are already probably amiable to this guy. I've increased the rest of my Cab factions to Apprehensive now, one step from being able to buy and sell .. woot!

This is alot more fun then turning in a zillion bone chips to the guard in Field of Bone and you get some chain armour that sells for a few plat a piece .. and if you're lucky the Locket, but the drop on the locket has been reduced by alot rescently.

Aalaria Xe'Losiba
49 DE Necro
Terew Marr
▲ Page top
RE: Survival Knives
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2002 at 12:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772471238
10 posts
The result of the quest is several different iksar faction increases and an insignificant amount of xp...That is all.

# Mar 12 2002 at 4:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754745399
64 posts
after i read your post wishing for a range item i did a search on range items with wis/int.starting at level 35ish you have several choices with very very similar stats.but perhaps for some reason your interested in the compass aspect of this item-in which case i remind you that one can drop a rusty dagger(or any weapon) on the ground and its head will always point north.
